info.title: Greenway FHIR and GAPI Manufactured OpenAPI
info.summary: Greenway publishes public developer documentation for a standards-based FHIR R4 API and proprietary GAPI surface used with Greenway EHR products for clinical data access, app embedding, bulk export, and event-driven workflows.
info.description: Manufactured OpenAPI artifact for Greenway FHIR and GAPI. This file was synthesized by Last Mile from curated research JSON and is not vendor-certified. Use it as an agent-consumable starting point, then validate paths, schemas, authentication, and server URLs with the vendor before production use. Greenway's developer platform describes two public API families: a standards-compliant FHIR R4 API serving Intergy and Prime Suite data, and a proprietary GAPI that supports reads and writes across clinical and financial data elements. The public docs describe SMART-on-FHIR OAuth flows, tenant-specific FHIR base URLs, bulk export support, event notification capabilities, and separate GAPI deployment and authentication documentation. Greenway also states that its current FHIR API is read-only while GAPI provides the write-capable proprietary surface. This is a healthcare application platform with both standards-based and proprietary integration models, but it does not represent asset or telemetry data. Asset data is Unsupported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

servers.description: Placeholder server template. Replace with the vendor-confirmed API host and base path before generating production clients.

externalDocs.description: Vendor documentation used as the primary public source for this manufactured contract.
